endpoints.name: /v1/domains
endpoints.description: GET/v1/domainsRetrieve a list of Domains for the specified Shopper

parameters.name: X-Shopper-Id
parameters.description: Shopper ID whose domains are to be retrieved

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Only include results with status value in the specified set

parameters.name: statusGroups
parameters.description: Only include results with status value in any of the specified groups

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of domains to return

parameters.name: marker
parameters.description: Marker Domain to use as the offset in results

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Optional details to be included in the response

parameters.name: modifiedDate
parameters.description: Only include results that have been modified since the specified date

endpoints.name: /v1/domains/suggest
endpoints.description: GET/v1/domains/suggestSuggest alternate Domain names based on a seed Domain, a set of keywords, or the shopper's purchase history

parameters.name: X-Shopper-Id
parameters.description: Shopper ID for which the suggestions are being generated

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Domain name or set of keywords for which alternative domain names will be suggested

parameters.name: country
parameters.description:
Two-letter ISO country code to be used as a hint for target region
NOTE: These are sample values, there are many
more

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Name of city to be used as a hint for target region

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Sources to be queried

parameters.name: tlds
parameters.description:
Top-level domains to be included in suggestions
NOTE: These are sample values, there are many
more

parameters.name: lengthMax
parameters.description: Maximum length of second-level domain

parameters.name: lengthMin
parameters.description: Minimum length of second-level domain

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return

parameters.name: waitMs
parameters.description:
Maximum amount of time, in milliseconds, to wait for responses
If elapses, return the results compiled up to that point
